chat-messages-select-policy.name: chat-messages-select-policy
chat-messages-select-policy.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM chat_sessions
        WHERE session_id = "chat_messages"."session_id"
        AND user_id = (select auth.uid())
      )

chat-messages-insert-policy.name: chat-messages-insert-policy
chat-messages-insert-policy.withCheck:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM chat_sessions
        WHERE session_id = "chat_messages"."session_id"
        AND user_id = (select auth.uid())
      )

admin-logs-select-policy.name: admin-logs-select-policy
admin-logs-select-policy.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM admin_permissions
        WHERE admin_id = (select auth.uid())
        AND is_active = true
      )

admin-permissions-select-policy.name: admin-permissions-select-policy
admin-permissions-select-policy.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM admin_permissions
        WHERE admin_id = (select auth.uid())
        AND admin_role = 'super_admin'
        AND is_active = true
      )

admin-permissions-manage-policy.name: admin-permissions-manage-policy
admin-permissions-manage-policy.using:
EXISTS (
        SELECT 1 FROM admin_permissions
        WHERE admin_id = (select auth.uid())
        AND admin_role = 'super_admin'
        AND is_active = true
      )
